Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to map static image, structure, language, semantics, and interaction risks to WCAG with review handoff; every Promise, stream, listener, timer, socket, file, browser context, and report sink needs one cleanup owner; then change one duplicate, accessibility state, axe result, resource budget, browser readiness, or manual-review condition without overclaiming. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Report code-level risks for keyboard traps, focus, motion, timing, targets, and status while requiring interaction evidence.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Keyboard Motion Limit model · Theory Keyboard Mo…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A source scan can prove keyboard and reduced-motion behavior.
